title: Red-Pill Policy Patch Schema
description: A single policy change within a policy pack. Each patch maps to a specific reason code and targets a narrow knob in the pipeline.

patch_id.description: Unique ID within the pack, e.g. 'add-react-createElement-signal'

reason.description: Controlled reason code from the audit taxonomy.

config_section.description: Which section of the merged config this patch modifies.

framework_key.description: When config_section is 'frameworks', which framework entry to modify.

library_name.description: When config_section is 'library_security', which library entry to modify.

language.description: When config_section is 'language_protections', which language to modify.

pattern_id.description: When modifying a specific pattern entry, its stable id.

changes.description: The actual changes to apply. Structure depends on change_type.

add.description: Entries to add (e.g., new detection signals, bypass markers, patterns).

remove.description: Keys, pattern ids, or values to remove.

update.description: Key-value pairs to merge/overwrite in the target entry.

set.description: Exact value to set (for scalar fields like confidence, weight).

justification.description: Human-readable explanation of why this change is correct.
